2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of directory attributes in NFSv4 by tracking the union of requested and supported dir attributes in the delegation, and only encoding the attributes in that union when sending add/remove/rename updates. This ensures that only valid and supported attributes are sent to the client, preventing potential errors or inconsistencies. The patch also introduces new data structures to store the directory attributes and notification masks, making it easier to manage and update these values. Overall, this patch enhances the reliability and robustness of NFSv4 by improving its handling of directory attributes.
